title: Rename device - restart the app
scenario: Device rename in Device Settings > General does not persist after app kill and restart on Poly Studio Mobile
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a Bluetooth audio device connected.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → General.
3. Tap the device's official name field.
4. Enter a new custom name for the device.
5. Tap Done to save the new name.
6. Force kill the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe it away from the recent apps list).
7. Re-launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
8. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → General.
9. Observe the device name displayed in the General tab.
expected: The custom name entered in step 4 is still displayed in the General tab after the app is killed and restarted.
